evidence-verification-gate.reason: Every applied correction was produced by re-retrieving the real source via a real tool call (WebSearch/WebFetch/PubMed) and then independently adversarially refuted; only defects the adversary UPHELD were eligible, and of those only the model-independent subset with an unambiguous scalar/code value was applied this pass.

source-discipline.reason: Anti-fabrication discipline held throughout: 3 sources that could not be re-retrieved were recorded as unretrievable rather than guessed, 7 unverifiable/possibly-nonexistent anchor sources were surfaced (not silently corrected), and 20 proposed corrections the adversary refuted were discarded. No proposed value was written to the DB unless it was a crisp, unambiguous scalar/code value; descriptive author/title strings were deliberately held.

doctrine-check.reason: This pass deliberately applied NO tier or evidence_type change: the ~44 confirmed tier/type reclassifications (which drop rows out of the anchor set) and the 71 tier-model-dependent defects were withheld pending the open tier-model decisions (weighted-strength, GAP-298 review-species, GAP-299 practice-stream). Only model-independent factual fields were touched.

bias_direction: A large automated sweep invites two failure modes: rubber-stamping machine-proposed changes into the record, and cherry-picking corrections that flatter the corpus. Bounded by an adversarial refutation gate on every defect, by applying only unambiguous scalar/code values (holding all string and tier changes for reviewed passes), by surfacing rather than quietly fixing the 7 unverifiable sources, and by publishing the full 256-defect report including the 20 refuted and 3 unretrievable so the withheld and rejected items are auditable.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer could argue that even scalar corrections (e.g. jurisdiction reassignments) encode modeling choices and should not be auto-applied without per-row human sign-off. Response: jurisdiction/language/year/count fields do not affect anchor status or best-practice weight, each was adversarially upheld against a live retrieval, each records its evidence in verification_note, and all are forward-only reversible; the consequential tier/type and identity-string changes were explicitly withheld for exactly the human-review reason raised.
